title: Figure 3 in Epidemiology of Blastocystis sp. infection in China: a systematic review
author: Deng, Lei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3. Phylogenetic relationships among the representative sequences of the Blastocystis small subunit ribosomal RNA (SSU rRNA) gene obtained from China, using the neighbor-joining method. The trees were rooted with GenBank sequence U37107. Bootstrap values greater than 50% from 1000 pseudoreplicates are shown.
steps_raw: Figure 3. Phylogenetic relationships among the representative sequences of the Blastocystis small subunit ribosomal RNA (SSU rRNA) gene obtained from China, using the neighbor-joining method. The trees were rooted with GenBank sequence U37107. Bootstrap values greater than 50% from 1000 pseudoreplicates are shown.
